title: The use of attractant traps for the assessment of sorghum shoot-fly Atherigona  Soccata Rondani (Muscidae: Diptera) populations
abstract: The sorghum shoot fly, Atherigona  soccata rondani (Muscidae: Diptera) is a serious pest in many sorghum growing areas of the world (Reddy & Davies, 1977).  Although the severity of damage varies considerably from season to season and year to year, late sown crops are usually severely affected...
